description: Simulate the "Poacher's Moon" of September 2024 at Kruger National Park to generate a tactical deployment schedule. From Skukuza, South Africa (24.99° S, 31.59° E, 265m), track the Moon's path from the evening of September 18, 2024, through the morning of September 19, 2024. Capture screenshots of the Moon at the exact moments of Moonrise, Transit (peak altitude), and Moonset to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Document the deployment plan in /home/ga/Desktop/poaching_patrol_plan.txt including the location, target date, and the observed UTC times (HH:MM format) for Moonrise, Transit (with its peak altitude), and Moonset.
